commands.dotnet: dotnet run -c Release --project benchmarks/dotnet/src/PerfBenchmarks -- --filter *NBodyBenchmarks* --artifacts results/raw/${RUN_ID}/dotnet --exporters json ${BDN_ARGS}
commands.java: mvn -Dmaven.repo.local=${MAVEN_REPO} -f benchmarks/java/pom.xml -DskipTests package && java -jar benchmarks/java/target/benchmarks.jar NBodyBenchmark -rf json -rff results/raw/${RUN_ID}/java/nbody.json ${JMH_ARGS}

commands.dotnet: dotnet run -c Release --project benchmarks/dotnet/src/PerfBenchmarks -- --filter *JsonSerdeBenchmarks* --artifacts results/raw/${RUN_ID}/dotnet --exporters json ${BDN_ARGS}
commands.java: mvn -Dmaven.repo.local=${MAVEN_REPO} -f benchmarks/java/pom.xml -DskipTests package && java -jar benchmarks/java/target/benchmarks.jar JsonSerdeBenchmark -rf json -rff results/raw/${RUN_ID}/java/json-serde.json ${JMH_ARGS}

commands.dotnet: dotnet run -c Release --project benchmarks/dotnet/src/PerfBenchmarks -- --filter *HashMapBenchmarks* --artifacts results/raw/${RUN_ID}/dotnet --exporters json ${BDN_ARGS}
commands.java: mvn -Dmaven.repo.local=${MAVEN_REPO} -f benchmarks/java/pom.xml -DskipTests package && java -jar benchmarks/java/target/benchmarks.jar HashMapBenchmark -rf json -rff results/raw/${RUN_ID}/java/hash-map.json ${JMH_ARGS}
